gates.title: Packaged update leaves the runtime ready without an immediate doctor repair step
evidence_required: Packaged update syncs runtime cron definitions after npm bump
Packaged update reloads managed macOS LaunchAgents after a real version change
Same-file hook sync noise no longer pollutes the packaged update path
Runtime doctor no longer keeps cleaned packaged installs red just because recent Codex transcript drift is already tracked with zero open conditioned debt

gates.title: Operators can export and import their active data safely from the CLI
evidence_required: nexo export writes a portable bundle with active DB, brain state, selected config, and personal scripts
nexo import restores that bundle into a clean runtime and creates a safety backup first
Regression tests cover the export/import CLI path end to end

gates.title: Package, docs, plugin artifacts, and website tell the same v5.3.7 story
evidence_required: Root package and integration artifacts all point to 5.3.7
README, changelog, llms, and release contract mention the packaged update self-heal and portable bundle commands
